commercialRule: Inventra automatically creates its updater download folders before preparing an update.
releaseNotes: Corrected the failed 10.0.10 patch JavaScript join bug.
Fixed ENOENT update preparation errors by auto-creating updater download folders before .download files are touched.
Adds safety guards for updater file write, stat, rename, copy, remove, and directory read operations.
Keeps the assisted installer with the desktop shortcut checkbox/option.
No SQL, app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater UI redesign changed.
